name: J.P. Morgan Wealth Management
scope_note: Covers J.P. Morgan Wealth Management (branch-based advisors, mass affluent to HNW) and J.P. Morgan Private Bank (UHNW, $10M+ clients) only. Excludes JPMorgan Chase consumer banking, commercial banking, investment banking, and J.P. Morgan Asset Management divisions.
ai_strategy_summary: J.P. Morgan's AI strategy in wealth management centers on the Coach AI ecosystem — compressing advisor prep time, surfacing real-time client intelligence, and enabling each advisor to serve 50% more clients over time. Coach AI (Wealth Management) and Connect Coach (Private Bank) are deployed to all 9,530 advisors and have driven a 20% year-over-year gross sales increase — the clearest documented AI-to-revenue link of any wealth manager tracked.

head_of_ai.name: Wealth Management Division Leadership
head_of_ai.title: No dedicated WM AI head publicly named

headline_metric: $5.9T client assets, +18% YoY — Coach AI deployment credited with 20% gross sales increase
headline_initiative: Coach AI (Wealth Management) + Connect Coach (Private Bank) — real-time client intelligence, next-best-action, and meeting prep via NLP, deployed to all 9,530 WM and PB advisors

advisor_productivity.headline: Coach AI / Connect Coach: 95% faster info retrieval, 20% YoY gross sales growth — all WM + PB advisors
advisor_productivity.detail: Coach AI (Wealth Management) and Connect Coach (Private Bank) deploy NLP to surface real-time client intelligence, next-best-action recommendations, and research digests before every client interaction. Deployed to all 5,755 WM advisors and 3,775 PB advisors. Result: 95% reduction in time to retrieve client information and a 20% year-over-year gross sales increase — with a stated goal of enabling each advisor to serve 50% more clients over 3–5 years.
evidence: 95% faster client information retrieval (Coach AI internal benchmark)
20% YoY gross sales growth attributed to Coach AI deployment
Deployed to all 5,755 Wealth Management advisors
Connect Coach deployed to all 3,775 Private Bank advisors
50% more clients per advisor capacity target (3–5 year horizon)

client_personalization.headline: Connect Coach surfaces real-time personalised recommendations at point of client interaction — all PB advisors
client_personalization.detail: Connect Coach surfaces personalised investment recommendations, portfolio insights, and next-best-action prompts in real time during advisor-client interactions at J.P. Morgan Private Bank. The personalisation layer is embedded in the advisor workflow — not a separate app — and draws on live client holdings, risk profile, and relationship history. Deployed to all Private Bank advisors serving UHNW clients.
evidence: Connect Coach: real-time personalised recommendations to all Private Bank advisors
Personalisation layer integrated into coach workflow, not a standalone tool
Draws on live client holdings, risk profile, and relationship history
Coach AI equivalent capabilities rolled out across WM advisor network

investment_portfolio.headline: AI-informed model portfolios spanning public and private markets — available across WM advisor network
investment_portfolio.detail: J.P. Morgan Wealth Management offers AI-informed model portfolios spanning public equities, fixed income, and alternative/private market asset classes. Advisors use these as a starting framework, with AI surfacing allocation suggestions aligned to client risk profiles and market conditions. Investment decisions remain human-approved — AI informs the recommendation, not the final decision.
evidence: Model portfolios span public equities, fixed income, and alternatives/private markets
AI-assisted allocation recommendations aligned to client risk profile
Human advisor approval required before implementation
Available across the WM advisor network

research_content.headline: WM advisors use AI tools for research summarisation, market commentary, and client report generation
research_content.detail: J.P. Morgan wealth management advisors have access to AI tools (including the firm's internal LLM-based suite) for research summarisation, market commentary drafting, and client-facing report generation. These tools reduce the time advisors spend on content production, freeing capacity for client-facing work. The WM-specific rollout builds on the firm's broader internal AI tooling but is scoped to advisor workflows.
evidence: AI research summarisation tools available to WM advisors
Market commentary and client report generation via AI tooling
Integrated into Coach AI advisor workflow
Reduces advisor content production time, increasing client-facing capacity

client_acquisition.headline: Acquisition strategy is advisor-led capacity expansion — no AI-native digital acquisition play in production
client_acquisition.detail: J.P. Morgan's client acquisition strategy in wealth management is advisor-led: by making each advisor more productive with AI, the firm grows AUM without proportionally growing headcount. The Self-Directed Investing platform serves a lower-AUM digital segment, but AI-native acquisition tools (prospecting, lead scoring) are not yet in production for the advisor network.
evidence: 50% more clients per advisor capacity target cited by management (3–5 year horizon)
Self-Directed Investing platform exists for mass-market segment
No announced AI-powered prospecting or lead scoring tool for WM advisors

operations_compliance.headline: AI-assisted advisor compliance and client onboarding workflows in early stages within WM
operations_compliance.detail: AI-assisted operations within J.P. Morgan's wealth management and private banking divisions are in early stages. The focus is on advisor workflow compliance — meeting documentation, follow-up tracking, and suitability flagging integrated into the Coach AI ecosystem. WM-specific operations AI is nascent; enterprise-wide tools (COiN, AML monitoring) serve commercial banking and are out of scope for this profile.
evidence: Compliance and documentation elements embedded in Coach AI advisor workflow
Suitability and follow-up tracking features in development within WM
No publicly announced standalone WM compliance AI product yet

new_business_models.headline: Client-facing version of Connect Coach under evaluation — would give HNW clients direct AI access
new_business_models.detail: J.P. Morgan is evaluating a client-facing version of the Connect Coach ecosystem that would allow high-net-worth and UHNW clients to interact directly with AI-generated portfolio recommendations and market intelligence — bypassing or augmenting the advisor layer. This is an early-stage exploration, not yet announced as a product. If launched, it would represent a meaningful shift in the private banking model.
evidence: Client-facing AI wealth interface under internal evaluation (not yet publicly announced)
Would allow HNW/UHNW clients direct access to AI-generated recommendations
Builds on existing Connect Coach architecture already deployed to PB advisors
